leadText: The Prop Case (Japanese: グッズケース Goods Case) is a Key Item introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Prop Case stores the Props used to dress up Pokémon for Pokémon Musicals . In Pokémon Black 2 and White 2 , if the player Memory Linked with Black or White , the Prop Case will come prepackaged with the Props obtained in that linked game.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A lovely case to store colorful Props for your Pokémon to wear in a musical. S V A wondrous, pretty case to store lots of colorful Props for your Pokémon to wear in a musical.

In Pokémon Black 2 and White 2 , if the player Memory Linked with Black or White , the Prop Case will come prepackaged with the Props obtained in that linked game.
